Bash(sqlite3 dynflowparserng.db "SELECT a.id, a.class, COUNT\(s.id\) as step_count, GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT s.state\) as states FROM actions a LEFT JOIN steps s ON a.id = s.action_id WHERE a.execution_plan_uuid = '82512462-a441-4fae-857c-91fd1832587c' GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.id")
